mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, operate_time, end_time, uid, user_name, primary_uid, affect_line, ds_id, ds_desc, session_id, status, log_ip, client_ip, requester, exec_sql, original_sql, resource, message, sql_kind, data_source_type
mapper.update: update dm_exec_sql_audit set status = 'SUCCESS' where session_id = #{sessionId} and status = 'WAIT_CONFIRM'
update dm_exec_sql_audit set status = 'ROLLBACK' where session_id = #{sessionId} and status = 'WAIT_CONFIRM'
update dm_exec_sql_audit set status = 'ERROR' where work_seq_number = #{wsn} and status in ('RUNNING','WAIT_CONFIRM')
mapper.delete: delete from dm_exec_sql_audit where primary_uid = #{puid} and #{date} > end_time limit 500
